controls.title: Control Environment
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values. The board demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight. Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities. The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals.
evidence: HR security policy and background check records

sub_controls.title: COSO Principle 1: Demonstrates Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
COSO Principle 3: Establishes Structure, Authority, and Responsibility
COSO Principle 4: Demonstrates Commitment to Competence

controls.title: Communication and Information
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant quality information to support the functioning of internal control. The entity communicates information internally and externally to support the functioning of internal control.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives. The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives across the entity and analyzes risks as a basis for determining how the risks should be managed.
evidence: Risk register with likelihood and impact ratings

sub_controls.title: COSO Principle 7: Identifies and Analyzes Risk
COSO Principle 9: Identifies and Analyzes Significant Change

controls.title: Monitoring Activities
controls.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning. The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner.

sub_controls.title: COSO Principle 16: Conducts Ongoing and/or Separate Evaluations
COSO Principle 17: Evaluates and Communicates Deficiencies

controls.title: Control Activities
controls.description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels. The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

sub_controls.title: COSO Principle 10: Selects and Develops Control Activities
COSO Principle 11: Selects and Develops General Controls over Technology
COSO Principle 12: Deploys through Policies and Procedures

controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events to meet the entity's objectives.
evidence: User access provisioning and deprovisioning records

sub_controls.title: Logical Access Security — Identification, Authentication, and Authorization
Security Threats from Outside the System Boundaries
Transmission, Movement, and Removal of Information

controls.title: System Operations
controls.description: To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations or new vulnerabilities, and uses a defined process to manage the event.

sub_controls.title: Monitoring of System Components for Anomalous Behavior
Identified Security Events Evaluation and Determination

controls.title: Change Management
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.

sub_controls.title: Change Management Process for System Changes

controls.title: Risk Mitigation
controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions and the use of vendors and business partners.

sub_controls.title: Vendor and Business Partner Risk Management

controls.title: Availability
controls.description: The entity's system availability for operation and use as committed or agreed upon is maintained.

controls.title: Confidentiality
controls.description: Information designated as confidential is protected to meet the entity's objectives.
evidence: Encryption configuration (at rest and in transit)

controls.title: Processing Integrity
controls.description: System processing is complete, valid, accurate, timely, and authorized to meet the entity's objectives.

sub_controls.title: Inputs and Outputs Completeness and Accuracy
